title: 4% Formaldehyde in .1M PB (FOR IMMUNO BRAINS) (1L)
steps: .4M Phosphate buffer pH 7.4 (250mls) 21.7 g Na2 HPO4 (sodium phosphate dibasic-heptahydrous) [86.8 g] ~Make sure dibasic completely dissolves before adding monobasic! 2.6 g Na H2 PO4 (sodium phosphate monobasic-monohydrous) [10.4 g] Dissolve in 200 ml of distilled H2O [800 mls] pH to 7.4 Bring to 250ml volume with distilled H2O

In separate 1000 ml volumetric flask:[2000ml] 2.250 ml 0.4 M phosphate buffer (pH=7.4) [500ml] 3.100 ml 37% formaldehyde [200mls] 4.Bring to 1L volume with distilled water (no need to re-pH) 2L] 5.Filter using side-arm flask (use glassware labeled ‘paraform’) **Please use gloves, protective eyeware and mask when working w/ formaldehyde. Label and date 1L 4% Formaldehyde and put in plastic bottle marked “4% FORM IMMUNO”.Put in black KOOB fridge (by -80 freezer).

0.15 M Saline Pre-fixative Rinse (1 L) [2L] 1.Add 9.0 g NaCl to 800 mL dH 2 O. [18g] 2.Add ~1000 units of heparin per 1L saline [2mls] 3. Stir until dissolved (good for 1 week). 4. AdddH 2 Oto bring to volume. 5. Label and refrigerate
creator: Molly Brennan
